summary: Completed comprehensive testing of updated German restaurant website with removed SPEISEKARTE navigation, extended contact form with phone/subject fields, new Impressum page with German legal content, and admin dashboard with IMPRESSUM management tab.

fixed_bugs.issue: AttributeError when updating nav content - dict had no model_dump() method
fixed_bugs.resolution: Fixed model_dump() handling for dict objects in update_site_content function

passed_tests: Navigation updated correctly - shows START, ÜBER UNS, KONTAKT, IMPRESSUM (no SPEISEKARTE)
Contact form has all required fields: name, email, phone, subject, message
Contact form submission works - POST /api/contact with extended fields
Impressum page loads with German legal content
GET /api/impressum returns substantial legal content (414+ chars)
Admin dashboard accessible with correct credentials
Backend API test suite: 21/21 tests passed (100% success rate)
Frontend navigation test: all expected items present
Contact form UI: phone and subject fields visible and functional
Impressum page navigation and content display
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (21/21 tests), Frontend: ~95% (admin interface elements need minor improvements)
